betterquesting:10.desc:8:
§6Semiconductor Engineering: N-Type Wafer Doping§f

§aN-type silicon is the foundation of every basic QMD controller!§f
N-Type Doped Silicon (`qmd:semiconductor:1`) is the electron-rich semiconductor used to fabricate the §bBasic Processor§f, controllers, and detector casings in QMD.

§6Doping Path§f:
§b• Silicon Boule§f (`qmd:semiconductor:2`) is grown from raw silicon and Hafnium via the §bOre Leacher§f + §bNC Manufactory§f chain.
§b• Silicon Wafer§f (`qmd:semiconductor:3`) is sliced from the boule using the §bNC Manufactory§f.
§b• N-Type Doped Silicon§f is produced by placing a Silicon Wafer into a powered §bFission Irradiator§f (recipe `waferSilicon → siliconNDoped`, 120,000 RF).

§6Direct Descendants (graph-confirmed)§f:
N-Type Doped Silicon is an ingredient in the following QMD/Nuclearcraft assembler recipes:
- §bBasic Processor§f (`qmd:semiconductor:4`) — needs N-Type + 4 Redstone + Gold Ingot + Silver Ingot
- §bSilicon Tracker Detector§f (`qmd:particle_chamber_detector:1`)
- §bAccelerator Computer Port§f (`qmd:accelerator_computer_port`)
- §bLinear Accelerator Controller§f (`qmd:linear_accelerator_controller`)
- §bBeam Dump Controller§f (`qmd:beam_dump_controller`)
- §bDecay Chamber Controller§f (`qmd:decay_chamber_controller`)
- §bTarget Chamber Controller§f (`qmd:target_chamber_controller`)
- §bEmpty Detector Casing§f (`qmd:part:1`)

§eTip§f: Build a §bFission Reactor§f first to power your Fission Irradiator — a §bFission Irradiator§f only functions while receiving neutron flux from an adjacent running reactor.
